scenarios.description: Empty expression returns an empty token list (no loop iterations, no braces/arrays)
scenarios.precondition: ExpressionConfiguration stub with implicitMultiplicationAllowed=true, arraysAllowed=true, structuresAllowed=true; no mocks

scenarios.description: Single number literal yields one token and returns normally (one iteration, implicit multiplication not triggered)
scenarios.precondition: ExpressionConfiguration stub with implicitMultiplicationAllowed=true, arraysAllowed=true, structuresAllowed=true; no mocks
scenarios.expectedResult: returned list has one NUMBER_LITERAL token with text "123"
pseudocode: assert tokens.size() == 1; assert tokens.get(0).getType() == TokenType.NUMBER_LITERAL; assert tokens.get(0).getToken().equals("123");

scenarios.description: Implicit multiplication between number and variable when allowed inserts '*'
scenarios.precondition: ExpressionConfiguration stub with implicitMultiplicationAllowed=true, arraysAllowed=true, structuresAllowed=true; FunctionDictionary returns variable token; OperatorDictionary contains '*' infix operator; no mocks
scenarios.expectedResult: returned tokens sequence is [NUMBER_LITERAL "2", INFIX_OPERATOR "*", VARIABLE_OR_CONSTANT "x"]
pseudocode: assert tokens.get(0).getToken().equals("2"); assert tokens.get(1).getToken().equals("*"); assert tokens.get(2).getToken().equals("x");

scenarios.description: Implicit multiplication disabled causes ParseException “Missing operator” after number-variable sequence
scenarios.precondition: ExpressionConfiguration stub with implicitMultiplicationAllowed=false, arraysAllowed=true, structuresAllowed=true

scenarios.description: Unbalanced open brace throws ParseException "Closing brace not found"
scenarios.precondition: ExpressionConfiguration stub with implicitMultiplicationAllowed=true, arraysAllowed=true, structuresAllowed=true
scenarios.expectedResult: throws ParseException with message "Closing brace not found"
pseudocode: throws ParseException with message "Closing brace not found";

scenarios.description: Unbalanced open array throws ParseException "Closing array not found"
scenarios.precondition: ExpressionConfiguration stub with implicitMultiplicationAllowed=true, arraysAllowed=true, structuresAllowed=true
scenarios.expectedResult: throws ParseException with message "Closing array not found"
pseudocode: throws ParseException with message "Closing array not found";

scenarios.description: Unexpected closing brace at start throws ParseException "Unexpected closing brace"
scenarios.precondition: ExpressionConfiguration stub with implicitMultiplicationAllowed=true, arraysAllowed=true, structuresAllowed=true
scenarios.expectedResult: throws ParseException with message "Unexpected closing brace"
pseudocode: throws ParseException with message "Unexpected closing brace";

scenarios.description: Unexpected closing array at start throws ParseException "Array close not allowed here" or "Unexpected closing array"
scenarios.precondition: ExpressionConfiguration stub with implicitMultiplicationAllowed=true, arraysAllowed=true, structuresAllowed=true

scenarios.description: Structure separator at start throws ParseException "Structure separator not allowed here"
scenarios.precondition: ExpressionConfiguration stub with implicitMultiplicationAllowed=true, arraysAllowed=true, structuresAllowed=true
scenarios.expectedResult: throws ParseException with message "Structure separator not allowed here"
pseudocode: throws ParseException with message "Structure separator not allowed here";

scenarios.description: Infix operator followed by another infix operator throws ParseException "Unexpected token after infix operator"
scenarios.precondition: ExpressionConfiguration stub with implicitMultiplicationAllowed=true, arraysAllowed=true, structuresAllowed=true; OperatorDictionary contains '+' and '*' infix operators
scenarios.expectedResult: throws ParseException with message "Unexpected token after infix operator"
pseudocode: throws ParseException with message "Unexpected token after infix operator";
